name: JEE Main
description: Gateway to NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs across India
eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics. Minimum 75% aggregate (65% for SC/ST).
pattern: 300 marks total. 90 questions across Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics. Multiple choice and numerical questions.
howWeHelp: We provide personalized JEE Main strategy, chapter-wise priority planning, mock test analysis, and college prediction based on your NTA score.

name: JEE Advanced
description: The only gateway to the prestigious IIT system
eligibility: Top 2.5 lakh JEE Main qualifiers. Maximum 2 attempts. Age: born on/after October 1, 2001.
pattern: Two papers (Paper 1 & 2) each of 3 hours. Multiple choice, integer type, and matching questions.
howWeHelp: Deep JEE Advanced preparation strategy, paper analysis, time management for 6-hour exam days, and IIT branch selection counselling.

name: MHT-CET
conductedBy: State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra
description: Primary entrance exam for engineering and pharmacy in Maharashtra
eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics (PCM) or Biology (PCB). Maharashtra domicile preferred.
pattern: PCM: 150 marks (Physics 50, Chemistry 50, Maths 50). MCQ format, no negative marking.
howWeHelp: Complete MHT-CET strategy, Maharashtra-specific coaching, CAP round guidance, and cutoff analysis for top colleges.

name: NEET UG
description: Single entrance exam for all medical (MBBS/BDS) admissions in India
eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry & Biology/Biotechnology. Minimum 50% aggregate (40% for SC/ST/OBC).
pattern: 720 marks. 180 questions from Physics, Chemistry & Biology. 4 marks for correct, -1 for incorrect.
howWeHelp: NEET preparation roadmap, biology-focused strategy, college selection for Maharashtra state quota and All India Quota.

name: BITSAT
fullName: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Admission Test
description: Entrance to BITS Pilani, Goa, and Hyderabad campuses
eligibility: Minimum 75% in PCM in 10+2. Should have studied Physics, Chemistry, English, and Math/Biology.
pattern: Online test. 130 questions covering Physics, Chemistry, English, Logical Reasoning, and Maths. 3 hours.
howWeHelp: BITSAT-specific preparation plan focused on English and Logical Reasoning sections, speed training, and application strategy.

name: VITEEE
description: Admission to VIT Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, and AP campuses
eligibility: 60% aggregate in PCM/PCB in 10+2. Open to all nationalities.
pattern: Online: 125 questions from Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology, English, and Aptitude. 2.5 hours.
howWeHelp: VITEEE application, campus selection strategy, branch preference guidance, and scholarship opportunities at VIT.

name: COMED-K
fullName: Consortium of Medical Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka
description: Entrance to 150+ private engineering colleges in Karnataka
eligibility: Minimum 45% in PCM in 10+2. Open to all states.
pattern: Online: 180 questions from Physics, Chemistry & Maths. 3 hours. No negative marking.
howWeHelp: COMED-K strategy for Maharashtra students, Karnataka college selection, and comparison with MHT-CET options.

name: CAT / MBA CET
fullName: Common Admission Test / MBA Common Entrance Test
description: Gateway to IIMs, top B-schools, and Maharashtra MBA institutes
eligibility: Bachelor's degree with minimum 50% marks. Final year students can also apply.
pattern: CAT: 66 questions, 2 hours. VARC, DILR, Quantitative Ability. MBA CET: 200 questions, 150 minutes.
howWeHelp: MBA CET preparation, IIM vs Maharashtra B-school comparison, application strategy, GD-PI preparation, and scholarship guidance.
